cms.title: Struxa 1.0.58
cms.summary: Security hardening: close an open-redirect bypass on the post-login ?next= parameter (rejects backslash/CRLF/scheme smuggling and /.. traversal); raise the default PHPAuth password floor from 3 to 8 characters; add per-IP throttling for POST /register (10/hour by default, override with CMS_REGISTER_MAX_ATTEMPTS_PER_HOUR).
